title: Consistency Is Allowed to Feel Easy
subtitle: A release-and-allow energy statement for money habits that stick
excerpt: A short energy statement practice for when the idea of showing up daily for your money feels heavy or dutiful. The release clears the pressure of consistency; the allow opens to money habits that feel natural rather than forced.
sourceNotes: The release-and-allow energy statement structure is drawn from The Money Zone: How To Release Hidden Resistance, Allow Flow And Manifest Millions (Rebecca Page, 2024). Adapted for Day 50 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A two-minute energy statement for when consistency with money feels heavy. The release names the pressure that builds around showing up daily; the allow opens to a version of money habits that sits easily in ordinary life.
I am ready to release all pressure, heaviness, and resistance around being consistent with money. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow consistency with money that feels easy, natural, and truly mine. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
The release-and-allow structure comes from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024). This statement is adapted for Day 50 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
